raw_text: after comparing prices from another app I was stopped using blinkit from long time but today I was in need for my baby formula powder *****store was closed at that time so I switch back to blinkit suddenly with a disappointment but after I got delivery option at late night I was really very surprised because I got at right time . Thank you Blinkit and also I have 1 req pls make prices less.

ordered dettol wipes but received baby wipes. the wrong product was picked up after complaint and i was promised a replacement or refund. more than a month has passed and neither the refund nor the correct product has been provided. customer support has been unhelpful and there is no easy way to contact them. very disappointing experience.

Blinkit’s service has gone downhill. Delivery times are inconsistent, customer support is unhelpful, and genuine complaints are not handled properly. The app promises quick and hassle-free service, but my experience has been the opposite. Not recommended

this service getting bad day to day as it's delivery partner making excuses to handover the order. they don't reach at the drop location and call customer to there pre-owned location. also there is no any helpnumber or site to place my problem

i was making the payment at that time there was no high surge charge when my payment got cancel due to network issue the charge increased by 30 rupees, is this the way u work and from 30 min my order is not moving and im not able to cancel it because if iam canceling it i am not get any refund

Bad experience. Items were missing from my order and delivery agent also enquired about the missing item. There is no proper response from customer care. finally they concluded as no item missing. 🤬🤬🤬

Very satisfied with Blinkit deliveries. The only negative point is the response of the delivery people to the COD option. When I asked that I be allowed the COD option the delivery man told me that EVERYONE that he delivered to on that particular day, had opted for the UPI option. So i asked him why Blinkit has the COD OPTION in that case. Please look into this. As customers we need to have options open.
I ordered something accidentally but after a second I realised and I went to cancel that but it's just doing that it's inconvenience we cannot do that, please fix it

when multiple orders are placed like an add-on to the existing order after successful transaction instead of showing in real time as multiple orders it can be combined to one single order is what I felt..

in hurry to deliver wrong items are being packed, I had ordered for both cheese slices and cheese block but I received 2 cheese blocks, I ordered for 3 avocados but received 3 packs of Kiwis. a person who wants delivery in 10 mins doesn't have time to report such issues.

very bad experience i had with blinkit when i ordered exercise rop and the quality is very bad then am trying to return the order within the 2hrs but there is no option to return option in blinkit home column then chatting customer care but they denied the request....please dont buy or use blinkit am going to un installed the app.. compare to like zepto,amazon,flipkart there is no option to return

this app is too useful that if we are not getting products in our area we can buy it from here and it is very good and I have ordered some products of stationery in vegetables they are very good and giving blinking 10 out of 10 rating very best app in the world

when you need things at an odd time at midnight and feel free like Blinkit hai..... thank god.... special thanks to the odd time service.... And yes...within minutes always all the time....we get things.... whenever we ordered. Great App.... Thank you to all Blinkit team and Blinkit service Partner.

I wish I could say I would never order anything from here but then I would br lying. these guys don't replace anything at all. Just give lame advice on how you can still use the product. one stupid lip gloss which is 200 rupees came looking like a clump without any pigmentation and when I asked for replacement customer person Tanishka told me to shake that clumpy gloss and use it. then she said to contact anybody but them because they aren't responsible for the clump. please do better.

bad service... delivery partner arguing.... I also add after buying experience if the product is not up to the mark as you expected... they said sorry I can't help... it's very sad full service I have gotten from blinkit.. still the service was most dissatisfactory.... try to upgrade yourself or god save you ...

Very poor quality carry bag. Every time I receive a Blinkit order, the bag is torn. The material is extremely weak and cannot even hold the items properly. Blinkit should improve the quality of its carry bags. Very disappointing. ⭐☆☆☆☆

one of the worst experience i have ever had and ur support team is of no use literally better shut all ur stores. I had booked by mistake lactogen 4 instead of lactogen 2 by mistake and i am contacting ur support team to exchange the same contacting the store but ur supporting team is of no use for timely help. I want that product to be returned and is of no use to me now. arsi is ur customer support name. kudos to you guys!!!

I have ordered dinner set I received it without packaging and out of 18piece I received only 12 and while complaining also only email option is there almost every time I'm receiving bad product even deliver boy said me to contact help support only and help support is not doing responding fraud it was not sealed fraud

It is a fantastic app ,I had used it for the very first time and it has incredible service ,it delivers its orders in the given time and no scam or fraud is done . Highly recommended to all. Thank you
Very disappointed to see currently unavailable each and every time I open the app to order anything and every time you people are unavailable. please upgrade your services man
